import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'; function HomePage() { const { t } = useTranslation(); return (
{/* Hero Section */}

{t('homePage.hero.title')} {t('homePage.hero.subtitle')}

{t('homePage.hero.description')}

{t('homePage.hero.browseCourses')} {t('homePage.hero.certificatePrograms')}
{/* Features Section */}

{t('homePage.features.title')}

{t('homePage.features.subtitle')}

{/* Feature 1 */}

{t('homePage.features.globalRecognition.title')}

{t('homePage.features.globalRecognition.description')}
{/* Feature 2 */}

{t('homePage.features.flexibleLearning.title')}

{t('homePage.features.flexibleLearning.description')}
{/* Feature 3 */}

{t('homePage.features.industryPartners.title')}

{t('homePage.features.industryPartners.description')}
{/* CTA Section */}

{t('homePage.cta.title')}

{t('homePage.cta.subtitle')}

{t('homePage.cta.applyNow')} {t('homePage.cta.contactUs')}
); } export default HomePage;
